examples.title: Pointer to Data Member Example
examples.description: Demonstrates basic pointer to integer data member usage
examples.explanation: The program shows declaring pointers to data members (wptr and hptr), initializing them with addresses of class members, and using the .* operator to access members through an object.

examples.title: Pointer to Member Function Example
examples.description: Shows how to use pointer to member function with multiple functions
examples.explanation: Demonstrates declaring and using pointers to member functions, showing how the same pointer can be reassigned to different functions and called through the same object reference.

examples.title: Menu-Driven Calculator using Member Function Pointers
examples.description: Uses array of member function pointers for operation selection
examples.explanation: Shows practical application of member function pointers - storing multiple function pointers in an array and selecting them dynamically based on user input.

examples.title: Using typedef with Member Pointers
examples.description: Simplifies complex member pointer declarations using typedef
examples.explanation: Demonstrates how typedef simplifies writing complex pointer-to-member declarations, making code more readable and maintainable.
